title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Astral Pipes - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Astral Pipes - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Kaizen

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
